N2001_DRUG_RGMN_RVW_IND N2001 Drug Regimen Review Indicator CHAR 1 Indicates a complete drug regimen review identified potential clinically significant medication issues. effective 10/01/2018
751 N2003_MDCTN_FLW_UP_IND N2003_MDCTN_FLW_UP_IND N2003 Medicationn Follow Up Indicator CHAR 1 Indicates the facility contacted a physician (or physician-designee) by midnight of the next calendar day and completed prescribed/ recommended actions in response to the identified potential clinically
